title: thelypteris walkeri
intro: Thelypteris walkeri, also known as the Walker's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris walkeri include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be made by steeping the leaves or rhizomes in hot water or applying them topically to the affected area.
